title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.535 - Veterans
text:
227.535.  Veterans — Heroes Highway designated for a portion of State Highway 231 in St. Louis City. — The portion of State Highway 231 from the interchange with Interstate 255 north to River City Casino Boulevard in St. Louis City shall be designated the "Veterans - Heroes Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with costs to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2017 S.B. 64)
